state.next-action: `18-06` is now executing in code: shared-section collection/routes/nav/composer paths have been removed, the runtime only resolves page-local blocks plus reusable presets, and the portal no longer exposes shared-section surfaces. The next execution pass should stay inside the simplified page model and focus on the user's remaining risk area: page-local block media and copy editing. Prioritize reliable media replacement on hero/service/media blocks, clear selected-block editing for hero and other local blocks, and clean behavior boundaries for code-owned app blocks such as `contactRequest` and `serviceEstimator`. Supporting notes remain in `.planning/todos/2026-04-07-layout-first-page-model-hero-block.md`, `.planning/todos/2026-04-07-instant-quote-app-block.md`, `.planning/todos/2026-04-07-composer-media-target-model.md`, `.planning/todos/2026-04-08-cms-route-gating-and-block-actions.md`, and `.planning/todos/2026-04-08-resend-delivery-and-customer-email-verification.md`.
